titleStmt.title: SII 16.130: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 130. (A.R. No. 160 of 1905.) MĀRKĀPŪR, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the antarāḷa-maṇḍapa of the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1466 (current), Śōbhakṛit, Māgha śu. 11, Bhīshma-ēkādaśi, corresponding to 1544 A.D., February 4, (Monday), °67.

It registers a gift of the village Tarnubāḍu alias Raghupatirājapuram situated in Kochcherlakōṭa-sīma to god Chennakēśava and to the Śrīvaishṇavas, by Aubhaḷayyadēva-mahārāju, son of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandyāla Siṅgarayyadēva-mahārāju of Sōma-vaṁśa and Ātrēya-gōtra. The donor is said to have obtained Kochcherlakōṭa-sīma as nāyaṅkara from the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatkēśavadēvasya mārakāpuravāsinaḥ . caturdaśānāṁ lōkānāṁ prabōdhayati śāsanaṁ . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana
śakavarṣaṁbulu 1466 Agunēṁṭi śōbhakṛt saṁvatsara māgha śu 11 lu svastiśrī śrīmāra kāpura cennakēśavaperumāḷakunnu śrīvaiṣṇavulakunnu daṁḍaṁ
samarpiṁcci Iccina bhūdānadharmaśāsanakramameṭlannanu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra sadāśivadēvamahārāyaluṁgāru
vidyānagaramaṁdunu vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛthvisāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍḍaṁgānu sōmavaṁśōdbhavulaina Ātrēyasagōtṛlaina śrīmaNmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara naṁdyāla śiṁgarayyadē
va mahārājuluṁgāriki putṛlaina Avubhaḷayyadēvamahārājuluṁgāru śrī mārakāpuraṁ cennakēśavaperumāḷlakunnu śrīvaiṣṇavulakunnu Iccina dharmaśāsanamu . sadāśiva dēvama
hārāyaluṁgāru mā nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁccanavadhariṁcina koccerlakōṭa śīmakuṁ cellina tarnnubāḍunnu Aṁdupallelu jammaladinna gaṁgireḍḍipalle kāravānipalle mēḍiseṭṭipalle nā
repalle vāsālapuraṁ kōmaṭikuṁṭa tellaṁbāḍu sahitamaina grāmālaku catuḥśīmakuṁnnu lōnaina taṁrnnubāḍugrāmānaku pratināmamaina raghupatirājapuraṁ
gaṇasaṁkhya vritulu 50 ki śrīcannarāyala Amṛtapaḷaku vritulu 20 nni śrīvaiṣṇavulaku vritulu 30 ki nānāgōtra nānāsūtra nānāśākhādhyāyu
laina śrīvaiṣṇavulu cekravartulaku vri 1 peraṁgūri veṁgaḷayyaṁgāri vri 1 kāmasamudrapu veṁgaḷayya vri 1 Ā Annaya vri 1 maṁne pedanarasayya vri 1 Ā pinanarasayya vri 1
veṁjerla Anaṁtayya pri 1 Ā Abbaya vri 1 Ivuṇi timaya vri 1 kummarikuṁṭle raghunāthaya vri 1 tiruvāmuḷi maṁgaḷagiri narasiṁgayya vri 1 jaṁpani nārasiṁhaya vri 1 Ā Ana
ṁtaya vri 1 Uppala veṁgaḷaya vri 1 vaṁkāyalapāṭi kēśavaya vri 1 śaṭhagōpaya vri 1 rāmakriṣṇaya vri 1 dēvarakoṁḍa Aṇṇaya vri 1 ya vri 1 vēda vri 1 śāstra vri 1
kaṁjarla koṁḍaya vri . marikaṁṭi telugaya vri . koṭravāya siṁgaya vri . vaṁgalacaṁnaya vri . kaṁdāḷaya vri . kaṁcarla timayya vri . Etirāju lakṣmaya vri . Etirāju vri . ma
lukaṁṭi raṁgaya vri 1 stalakaraṇālu pemarāju vri 1 koḷamarāju vri 1 vūrakaraṇaṁ mallaya vri 1 kaḍapa timaya vri 1 Aṁttu vri 20 Ubhayaṁ vri 50 dīnni I tathātithi bhīṣmaĒkādaśi puṇyakālamaṁddu
raghupatirājuṁgāriki puṇyaṁgānu śrīcanarāyala sannidhini sahiraṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrva kamugānu sadyaḥparicēdamugānu dānavikrayapariparttanayōgyaṁgānu Aṣṭabhōgatējasvā
myamulōṁgānu staṁbastitanihitaka diśāṁtasuṁkhasuṁḍidalulōṁgānu dhāravōsi Istimigāna mī putrapautrapāraṁparyaṁ ĀcaṁdrārkkasthāIgānu Anubhaviṁci bratuku vāru . tarlu
pāṭi polaṁlōni pallelavārlanu śāsanānaku lōnaina kṣētraṁ śrīceṁnarāyala bhāgaṁ Ūri Uttarapu khaṁḍigānu śrīvaiṣṇavula bhāgaṁ 1 . ki dakṣiṇa khaṁḍikānu . Aṁtu cenarāyala vri 20 ki vaccinaṭṭi
khaṁḍikaphalamaṁtavaṭu nityamunnu raghupatirājula vanamugānu śrīcenarāyalu sōpaskarasa hitaṁgānu Āragiṁcaṁgalavāru Aṁdu prasādaṁ
cāturbhāgamunnu mannevārikiccina māneṁḍu cāturbhāgamunnu . grāmakaraṇālaku 12 māneṁḍu
Digital edition of SII 16.130 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
